ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data entry */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price at the start of the period */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price reached during the period */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price reached during the period */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price at the end of the period */,
  "adjusted_close_price" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price for splits and dividends */,
  "volume_millions" TEXT /* Volume traded in millions */,
  "change_percentage" TEXT /* Daily percentage change in price */,
  "52_week_high" TEXT /* 52-week high price */,
  "52_week_low" TEXT /* 52-week low price */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization */,
  "pe_ratio" TEXT /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datetime", "instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the instrument belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the exchange */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level to different types of data */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_access_level FOREIGN KEY ("access_level") REFERENCES access_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument the alert is for */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification when the alert is triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (active, triggered, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of checking the alert condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data stream */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being streamed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the data stream */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the data stream */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data stream (active, paused, completed) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality metrics of the data stream */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., API, WebSocket) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_streams_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., trend analysis, statistical analysis) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the historical data */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the historical data */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* User who executed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_analysis_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument predicted */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction made (e.g., price prediction, volume prediction) */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_value" TEXT /* Predicted value based on the model */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model used */,
  "actual_value" TEXT /* Actual value post-prediction for comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was integrated */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data retrieval */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the access level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access level */,
  "data_scope" TEXT /* Scope of data accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)
